title: Handshake vs Snov.io — Honest Comparison for LinkedIn Automation
description: Comparing Handshake and Snov.io for LinkedIn automation and outreach. See features, pricing, lead generation capabilities, and LinkedIn depth side-by-side.

overview.handshake: Handshake is a LinkedIn automation platform built from the ground up for multi-sender rotation. It lets teams manage unlimited LinkedIn sender accounts from a single dashboard, with built-in warmup scheduling, a unified inbox, and premium residential proxies included in every plan. Handshake's pricing model is based on the number of sender accounts — not per-seat — so your entire team can collaborate without multiplying costs. Plans start at $69/month for 1 sender and scale to enterprise volumes.
overview.competitor: Snov.io is an all-in-one sales toolbox that combines email finding, email verification, email warmup, email drip campaigns, and a CRM — with LinkedIn automation as an add-on. Founded in 2017, Snov.io is best known for its email finder Chrome extension and B2B database. LinkedIn automation is available through the LinkedIn Automation add-on at $69/month per LinkedIn account, which requires a base Snov.io plan starting at $39/month. The LinkedIn add-on includes cloud-based connection requests, messages, profile visits, and InMails through a dedicated browser environment.

featureComparison.handshake: Built-in, core feature — rotate outreach across multiple LinkedIn accounts automatically
featureComparison.competitor: Not available — each LinkedIn account operates independently

featureComparison.handshake: Not included — integrates with external tools
featureComparison.competitor: Core feature — email finder, verifier, and Chrome extension for LinkedIn email extraction
Full email drip campaign builder with tracking, A/B testing, and deliverability tools

featureComparison.handshake: Full-featured: multi-step sequences, conditional logic, A/B testing, multi-sender rotation
featureComparison.competitor: Cloud-based connection requests, messages, profile visits, InMails — add-on feature

featureComparison.handshake: Single inbox for all LinkedIn sender accounts
featureComparison.competitor: CRM-style pipeline view for email — LinkedIn conversations managed separately

featureComparison.handshake: No built-in CRM — integrates with external CRMs
featureComparison.competitor: Built-in sales CRM with pipeline stages, deal tracking, and notes

featureComparison.handshake: Automated LinkedIn account warmup with gradual ramp-up
featureComparison.competitor: Email warmup included — LinkedIn warmup is basic

featureComparison.handshake: Unlimited team seats on every plan
featureComparison.competitor: Team seats included on higher plans, per-seat on lower plans

featureComparison.handshake: Premium residential proxies included per sender account
featureComparison.competitor: Cloud-based LinkedIn execution with dedicated environment — proxy quality not specified
Built-in technology checker to identify what tools prospects use
$345/mo+ ($39/mo base + 5 × $69/mo per LinkedIn account) — varies by base plan

sections.handshakeWins: Handshake is purpose-built for LinkedIn automation — it's not an afterthought or add-on. The multi-sender rotation, automated warmup, premium residential proxies, and unified inbox are all features Snov.io's LinkedIn add-on doesn't match. For teams running multiple LinkedIn accounts, Handshake is dramatically cheaper: 5 senders cost $199/mo on Handshake vs $345+/mo on Snov.io (base plan + 5 LinkedIn add-ons). The pricing gap grows even wider as you scale. Handshake's dedicated LinkedIn safety infrastructure is also more robust — purpose-built residential proxies and human-like patterns vs Snov.io's general cloud browser environment.
sections.competitorWins: Snov.io is a comprehensive sales toolbox, and its email capabilities are excellent. The email finder and verifier are among the best in the market — the Chrome extension lets you extract emails directly from LinkedIn profiles, company websites, and search results. The built-in CRM means you don't need a separate tool for pipeline management. Email drip campaigns with warmup and deliverability optimization are mature features. The technology lookup tool is useful for targeting companies based on their tech stack. If you're running an email-first outreach operation with LinkedIn as a supplement, Snov.io provides more tools in one place.
sections.whoShouldChooseHandshake: Choose Handshake if LinkedIn is your primary outreach channel and you need to operate multiple sender accounts safely and efficiently. Handshake is the right choice for teams focused on LinkedIn-first outreach, agencies managing client LinkedIn accounts, and anyone who needs multi-sender rotation with a unified inbox.
sections.whoShouldChooseCompetitor: Choose Snov.io if email is your primary channel and you want everything in one platform — email finding, verification, campaigns, CRM, and some LinkedIn automation. It's well-suited for solo operators and small teams that want an all-in-one sales toolkit, and for teams that need email finding and verification as a core workflow.
sections.verdict: Different tools for different channel strategies. Handshake is the superior LinkedIn automation platform — deeper features, better safety, and more cost-effective for multi-account operations. Snov.io is the superior email outreach and prospecting toolkit with LinkedIn as a useful add-on. Choose based on your primary channel: LinkedIn-first → Handshake, email-first → Snov.io. Many teams end up using both — Snov.io for email finding/verification and email campaigns, Handshake for dedicated LinkedIn outreach.

faqs.question: Is Snov.io's LinkedIn automation as good as Handshake's?
faqs.answer: No. Snov.io's LinkedIn features are an add-on to an email-first platform. It lacks multi-sender rotation, a dedicated LinkedIn unified inbox, automated warmup scheduling, and the same level of residential proxy infrastructure. For serious LinkedIn outreach, Handshake is significantly more capable.

faqs.question: Can I use Snov.io's email finder with Handshake?
faqs.answer: Yes — this is a great combination. Use Snov.io to find and verify prospect emails from LinkedIn profiles, then use Handshake for LinkedIn outreach and Snov.io for email follow-ups. You get best-in-class tools for each channel.

faqs.question: How much does Snov.io cost for LinkedIn automation?
faqs.answer: Snov.io requires a base plan (starting at $39/mo) plus the LinkedIn Automation add-on at $69/mo per LinkedIn account. For 5 LinkedIn accounts, that's $345+/mo vs $199/mo on Handshake.

faqs.question: Does Snov.io include residential proxies for LinkedIn?
faqs.answer: Snov.io's LinkedIn add-on runs in a cloud browser environment, but they don't specify premium residential proxies. Handshake includes dedicated residential proxies per sender account on every plan — a higher safety standard for LinkedIn automation.

faqs.question: Which tool is better for agencies?
faqs.answer: Handshake, for LinkedIn outreach specifically. The multi-sender rotation, unlimited team seats, and workspace management make it ideal for agencies managing multiple client campaigns. Snov.io is better if the agency needs email finding and email campaigns as the primary service.
